BOTH MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 2, 2008. BOTH MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DOE 4 DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM DEC-02-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT DEC-03-2008, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. (302)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. COUNSEL INFORMED THE COURT THAT THE PARTIES SUBMITTED TO THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO HAVE LEAVE OF FULL TWO WEEKS (14 DAYS) FROM THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT WAS GRANTED. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH 14 DAYS LEAVE FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO AMEND AS TO THE FOLLOWING CAUSES OF ACTION: 4TH, 5TH 6TH, 7TH AND 11TH. PLAINTIFF MUST CLARIFY THESE CAUSES OF ACTION AND FOCUS THE CLAIMS ON DEFENDANTS' CONDUCT AS DIRECTED TOWARD PLAINTIFF OR OTHER VICTIMS AT THE ST. FRANCIS CABRINI SCHOOL AS CONTRASTED WITH OTHER VICTIMS OF ABUSE THROUGHOUT THE DIOCESE. PLAINTIFF MUST CLARIFY WHAT IS BEING ALLEGED IN THE THREE FRAUD CAUSES OF ACTION -4TH, 5TH AND 11TH CAUSES OF ACTION- AND MAKE CLEAR THE DISTINCTION PLAINTIFF APPARENTLY SEEKS TO PLEAD. PLAINTIFF ALSO MUST PROVIDE GREATER SPECIFICITY AS TO WHEN THE FRAUDULENT EVENTS OCCURRED AND WHO WAS INVOLVED. THE DEMURRERS ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 8TH AND 9TH CAUSES OF ACTION, ON OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED. THE DEMURRERS ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 10TH AND 13TH CAUSES OF ACTION FOR THERE IS NO BASIS FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF OR A PUBLIC NUISANCE BASED ON THE FACTS ALLEGED. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 12TH CAUSE OF ACTION. PARTIES FURTHER STIPULATE TO DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Continued To Mar-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Paul E. Gaspari, Esq. of Tobin & Tobin 415-433-1400, appearing for defendant Roman Catholic Archbishop of San Francisco
No other appearances.

Ruling:
DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Counsel informed the Court that the parties submitted to the tentative ruling. Plaintiff's request to have leave of full two weeks (14 days) from the notice of entry of order to amend the complaint was granted. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: The demurrer is sustained with 14 days leave from notice of entry of order to amend as to the following causes of action: 4th, 5th 6th, 7th and 11th. Plaintiff must clarify these causes of action and focus the claims on defendants' conduct as directed toward plaintiff or other victims at the St. Francis Cabrini School as contrasted with other victims of abuse throughout the Diocese. Plaintiff must clarify what is being alleged in the three fraud causes of action -4th, 5th and 11th causes of action- and make clear the distinction plaintiff apparently seeks to plead. Plaintiff also must provide greater specificity as to when the fraudulent events occurred and who was involved.
The demurrers are sustained without leave to amend as to the 8th and 9th causes of action, on opposition having been filed.
The demurrers are sustained without leave to amend as to the 10th and 13th causes of action for there is no basis for injunctive relief or a public nuisance based on the facts alleged.
The demurrer is overruled as to the 12th cause of action.
Parties further stipulate to defendant's demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 14th cause of action. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 =(302/PJM/JW)
